headline: Netflix Thriller Auteur Albert Pintó Plots High-Stakes 'Lions in Winter'
lede: Spanish director Albert Pintó, fresh off Netflix hits like 'Money Heist' and 'Nowhere', is pivoting to a pulse-pounding revenge narrative with his latest project.
body:
Albert Pintó continues his ascent in international thriller cinema with 'Lions in Winter', a high-voltage revenge drama that promises to showcase the director's signature tension-building techniques.

The project reunites Pintó with producer Álvaro Ariza at Esto También Pasará, marking their latest collaboration after a string of successful genre entries. Sony Pictures Entertainment Iberia and Film Factory are backing the production, which is currently in post-production and generating significant industry buzz.

Pintó's reputation for kinetic storytelling — honed through global streaming sensations like 'Money Heist' and the survival thriller 'Nowhere' — suggests 'Lions in Winter' will deliver another adrenaline-fueled narrative. The filmmaker has demonstrated consistent skill in transforming genre conventions, particularly in stories involving complex moral landscapes and high-stakes confrontations.

While specific plot details remain under wraps, industry insiders anticipate the film will continue Pintó's trend of subverting audience expectations and delivering nuanced character studies within pulse-pounding frameworks.
key_facts: Directed by Albert Pintó of 'Money Heist' fame
Backed by Sony Pictures Entertainment Iberia
Reunites Pintó with producer Álvaro Ariza
